zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD运行于69.4附近，处于窄幅横盘结构，反弹动能有限，短线仍以整理为主，趋势略偏弱。

MACD为负值显示空头动能占优，虽缺少RSI但价格略低于近期高点，动能修复不足，需警惕下行延续。

SMA20在69.15形成短期支撑，当前价格略上方运行，上方70.06构成即时阻力，突破前维持区间震荡。

操作上建议高抛低吸为主，69.15附近关注支撑反弹，跌破则看向68.5，突破70.1可轻仓追多。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD trades in a tight consolidation near 69.48 after a modest 0.73% decline, reflecting subdued short-term momentum. Price remains confined between the intraday high of 70.06 and low of 69.42, showing balance between buyers and sellers. The broader structure leans slightly bearish as repeated failures above the 70.00 handle signal weakening upside pressure and a lack of strong continuation from recent rebounds.

MACD at -0.4517 indicates mild bearish momentum, though the flat signal line suggests the move lacks strong acceleration. This points to consolidation rather than an impulsive downtrend. With RSI unavailable, price action becomes more important; trading just above the 20-SMA at 69.1475 implies a neutral-to-fragile bullish base. Overall, indicators suggest indecision with a slight bearish tilt rather than a trending market.

Immediate support is located at 69.42, with stronger structural support near the 20-SMA at 69.15. A break below this zone could open downside toward 68.80 and potentially 68.20 if selling pressure increases. Resistance is defined at 70.06, followed by a secondary level near 71.20. Sustained rejection below 70.00 keeps the market range-bound and prevents any meaningful bullish trend confirmation.

Short-term traders may favor range strategies, buying near 69.15–69.40 with tight stops below 69.10 and targets near 70.00–70.50. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 70.10 before expecting continuation toward 71.20. On the downside, a break under 69.15 would favor short positions targeting 68.80. Given muted volatility and conflicting signals, cautious positioning and disciplined risk management remain essential.
